creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Dirk Meyer from comment #1)

Thank you for comments.

> According to Masafumi NAKANE <max@wide.ad.jp> the author gives permission to distribute this software on FreeBSD CDROM.

I overlooked it. Then dist-sell should be added to LICENSE_PERMS.

As for pkg-mirror and pkg-sell there are following sentence in license terms.

> c. バイナリのみの配布は許されない。(付加価値のものも含む)

It means

> c. Distribution of binary only is not permitted (Including binary of value added version).

So unless there is special permission to FreeBSD, pkg-mirror and pkg-sell should not to be added.
